title: Lines On South Of Scotland.
content:
The South of Scotland did produce
            Heroic Wallace and the Bruce,
            And even time will never blot
            The record of her Burns and Scott,
            And Tanahill renowned bard,
            And that sweet songster Ettrick Shepherd.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James McIntyre delivers a powerful performance in "Lines On South Of Scotland."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
